NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND SANCTIONS, SUPPORTING MEMO, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSIT HEARING SET FOR AUG-10-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-10-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SPECIFICALLY JUSTIFY HAVING 18 MEDICAL EXPERTS TO TESTIFY ON THEIR BEHALF. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PARE DOWN THIS LIST TO 10 AND TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH A SHORT SUMMARY OF WHAT EACH WITNESS WILL TESTIFY TO. MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $600 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MUST REMIT THIS AMOUNT TO DEFENDANT BY SEPTEMBER 1, 2011. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-06-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And Sanctions, Supporting Memo
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND SANCTIONS. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's motion for a protective order is granted. Plaintiff has failed to specifically justify having 18 medical experts to testify on their behalf. Plaintiff is ordered to pare down this list to 10 and to provide defendant with a short summary of what each witness will testify to. Motion for sanctions in the amount of $600 is granted. Plaintiff's counsel must remit this amount to defendant by September 1, 2011. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
